extraction.one_line_summary: GODEAU David won the uphill sprint finish at Castries-Ansi after Jumbo-Visma burned matches leading out VAN AERT but lost positioning in final curves.
tactical_patterns: Jumbo-Visma used both ROGLIC and VINGEGAARD as lead-out on Cat-2 uphill finish, revealing GC riders sacrificing for sprinter.
Breakaway absorbed on final climb rather than earlier, allowing ROLAND to collect KOM points before bunch sprint setup.
GODEAU weaved through pack in final curves to steal win, exploiting VAN AERT's premature positioning celebration.

rider_signals.VAN AERT Wout: negative: Lost uphill sprint despite perfect Jumbo lead-out from GC riders, suggesting overconfidence or poor final 200m positioning
rider_signals.GODEAU David: positive: Timed uphill sprint perfectly and navigated traffic better than favorite, significant form signal pre-Tour
rider_signals.VUILLERMOZ Alexis: negative: Lost yellow jersey by 30+ seconds on Category 2 finish, weaker than expected on moderate climbing
rider_signals.GUERREIRO Ruben: positive: Nearly podiumed uphill sprint finish, versatility signal for non-specialist climber
rider_signals.ROGLIC Primoz: neutral: Worked as domestique for VAN AERT on uphill finish, tactical choice suggests Dauphine not primary objective
